_template: THE WhatsApp VOICE agent — a text agent on WhatsApp that qualifies in chat, then escalates the conversation to a LIVE AI voice call via Zernio's start_call node, with the call answered by a Retell AI voice agent (forwardTo a Retell SIP/WebSocket endpoint). Memory + human-escape + graceful call fallback. Copy it, fill the [BRACKETS] in the text agent's systemPrompt, set <profileId>/<accountId>/<model>, set <RETELL_FORWARD_URI>, strip every _ key, POST to /v1/workflows, then /activate.
_what_it_does: 1) Greets and qualifies every inbound WhatsApp message with Claude (text, with memory). 2) When the contact wants to talk it through, it offers a voice call. 3) On CALL, start_call rings the contact on WhatsApp and bridges the call to your Retell AI voice agent (forwardTo). 4) Falls back to text if the call can't connect; hands off to a human on request or AI error.
_two_tools_one_flow: Zernio runs the messaging/orchestration + places the WhatsApp call. Retell AI runs the actual real-time voice conversation. start_call.forwardTo is the bridge between them.
_fill_in: systemPrompt of the 'agent' (text) node — replace every [BRACKET] with your business details. Keep the part that offers a call and tells them to reply CALL.

<RETELL_FORWARD_URI> on the 'call' node's forwardTo — your Retell agent's inbound destination. Two supported shapes: SIP (sip:<retell-number-or-trunk>@sip.retellai.com) once you've imported a number in Retell and bound it to your agent_id, OR a WebSocket media endpoint (wss://...) per Zernio's WhatsApp Calling docs (Vapi/Retell/any voice agent). The Retell AGENT's own system prompt is a separate artifact — see retell-voice-agent.base.md.
_memory: The text 'agent' node has no built-in history. The 'remember' set_variable appends each turn to {{history}}; userPromptTemplate feeds {{history}} back — that's the multi-turn memory. Don't remove it.
_human_escape: The 'route' condition checks each inbound message for a human request and jumps to handoff; everything else flows to the text agent. The 'callcheck' condition routes a CALL/yes-style reply to start_call; anything else loops back to the agent.
_call_node: start_call is WhatsApp-only. 'to' = the contact's WhatsApp number (verify the exact run variable Zernio exposes for the contact's number against a live execution; {{contactPhone}} is a placeholder). 'forwardTo' = where the call is bridged. 'requirePermissionFirst': true asks the contact to accept a call from your business (WhatsApp opt-in) — keep it on. 'recordingEnabled': false by default; only enable with consent + disclosure. saveAs stores the call result.
_customize: Swap the text model (claude-haiku-4-5 = cheaper/faster, claude-sonnet-4-6 = balanced, claude-opus-4-8 = strongest). BYOK: store your Anthropic key in Zernio + set provider/model; omit provider for Zernio's built-in path. Retell is billed by your Retell account directly (separate from Zernio carrier charges).
name: WhatsApp Voice AI Agent (Zernio + Retell)
description: Qualifies inbound WhatsApp chats with Claude, then escalates to a live AI voice call answered by a Retell AI voice agent via start_call. Built via zernio-voice-agent.

rules.value: (?i)(human|real person|speak to (someone|a person)|talk to (someone|a person)|representative|customer service rep|agent)

config.systemPrompt:
# HOW TO USE THIS (delete this block once filled in)
# Replace everything in [BRACKETS] with your business details. Plain language is fine. KEEP the part that offers a voice call.

# ROLE
You are the WhatsApp assistant for [BUSINESS NAME]. [ONE LINE ABOUT THE BUSINESS]. You help people in chat AND you can put them on a quick live call with our AI voice agent when that's faster.

# WHAT YOU DO
- Answer questions clearly and quickly in chat.
- Figure out what the person actually needs.
- When their question is better handled by talking (it's detailed, they're deciding, or they ask to talk), OFFER a call: 'Want me to ring you here on WhatsApp so we can talk it through? Just reply CALL and I'll connect you in a few seconds.'
- If they say yes / reply CALL, confirm warmly: 'Perfect — connecting you now. Tap to accept the call.'

# WHAT YOU KNOW (use ONLY this and the conversation so far — never guess)
- Hours: [e.g. Mon-Fri 9am-6pm ET]
- What we offer & prices: [list]
- Common questions & answers: [Q: ... A: ...]
- Useful links: [website, booking, etc.]

# STYLE
- Warm, direct, human. Short messages, one point at a time, never a wall of text. A little emoji is fine.
- Use the conversation so far — never repeat a question or re-introduce yourself.
- Match the person's language and tone.

# RULES
- Only use the facts above. If you don't know, say you'll check — never invent prices, policies, availability, or dates.
- Offer the call when it genuinely helps; don't force it every message.

# HAND OFF TO A HUMAN WHEN
- They ask for a person, they're upset, or it's a complaint / billing / sensitive issue.

config.text: I'd love to call you here on WhatsApp — please allow calls from us, then reply CALL again and I'll ring you. 📞
Hmm, I couldn't connect the call just now — let's keep going right here. What can I help with?
Thanks for hopping on the call! Anything else I can help you with here? 🙌

config.note: Handed to a human (requested by the contact, or the AI errored).
